violations.text: Garlic in oil was observed held at 74 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Garlic in oil was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the pizza prep unit. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2025
